EMS / UI Operations.epcems_login: Opens a session on the EPC/EMS management interface.
EMS / UI Operations.epcems_logout: Closes the active EPC/EMS session cleanly.
EMS / UI Operations.epcems_capture_software_patch: Retrieves the installed software patch version.
EMS / UI Operations.epcems_capture_software_license: Captures active license details and validity.
EMS / UI Operations.epcems_capture_subscriber_details: Fetches subscriber profile and session info.
EMS / UI Operations.epcems_capture_node_snmp_check: SNMP health check on the EPC node.
EMS / UI Operations.epcems_capture_node_alarms: Fetches all active/recent alarms on the node.
EMS / UI Operations.epcems_capture_sls_peer_info: Captures SLs peer info for LBS validation.

Device Setup & Management.preset_mobiles: Applies a predefined config profile to all test devices.
Device Setup & Management.reset_mobiles: Resets individual devices to factory defaults.
Device Setup & Management.connect_mobile: Connects a device to the test framework.
Device Setup & Management.disconnect_mobile: Disconnects a device from the test framework.
Device Setup & Management.check_radio: Verifies current radio tech and signal state.
Device Setup & Management.change_radio: Switches device to a different radio (LTE / 5G).

Voice Calls.mo_mt_voice_call: Full MO-MT voice call (setup → connect → end).
Voice Calls.mo_mt_voice_call_start: Initiates MO voice call, waits for MT to answer.
Voice Calls.mo_mt_voice_terminate_call: Terminates an active MO-MT voice call.
Voice Calls.mo_voice_call_start: Initiates MO-only voice call (no MT leg).
Voice Calls.mo_merge_call: Merges two calls into a 3-way conference.

Video Calls.mo_mt_video_call_start: Initiates MO video call, waits for MT to answer.
Video Calls.mo_mt_video_terminate_call: Terminates an active MO-MT video call.

Call Forwarding & Waiting.mo_mt_fw_voice_call_start: Initiates a forwarded MO voice call.
Call Forwarding & Waiting.mo_mt_fw_voice_call_waiting: Tests call waiting during a forwarded voice call.
Call Forwarding & Waiting.mo_mt_fw_video_call_waiting: Tests call waiting during a forwarded video call.

SMS.mo_mt_p2p_sms: Sends + receives P2P SMS between two devices.
SMS.mo_p2p_sms: Sends P2P SMS (MO side only, no MT validation).

Special Calls.mo_helpline_call: Originates a call to a helpline number.
Special Calls.mo_ussd_call: Initiates a USSD session and validates response.

Packet Capture & Analysis.packet_capture_stop: Stops capture and saves traffic to file.
Packet Capture & Analysis.search_pcap_file: Locates a specific pcap file by name/timestamp.
Packet Capture & Analysis.pcap_parser: Parses pcap file for protocol-level analysis.
Packet Capture & Analysis.find_first_ue_attach: Finds first UE attach event in pcap.
Packet Capture & Analysis.find_first_ue_attach_deattach: Finds first UE attach + detach sequence in pcap.

Utilities.run_command: Executes a shell/AT command on the device.
Utilities.sanitize_response: Cleans raw command output for processing.
Utilities.print_results: Outputs final test verdict to the report.
Utilities.text_to_image2: Converts test result text into an image.
